trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: watch
trends.title: Benchmark 刷新频率加快
trends.text: 模型性能天花板持续提升，但实际应用差距仍待验证

trends.label: real
trends.title: 多模态成为标配
trends.text: 文本、图像、音频、视频的统一处理能力越来越普遍

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

cover.title: WildTableBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Foundation Models on Table Understanding In the Wild
cover.summary: Using multimodal foundation models to analyze table images is a high-value yet challenging application in consumer and enterprise scenarios. Despite its importance, current evaluations rely largely…
cover.why_it_matters: WildTableBench 让 AI 能同时处理文本、图像、语音，应用场景扩大了
cover.content_angle: 实测 WildTableBench 做一个具体任务，发帖「这个 AI 工具能帮你省多少时间」

cover.title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI

cover.title: Boosting Omni-Modal Language Models: Staged Post-Training with Visually Debiased Evaluation
cover.summary: Omni-modal language models are intended to jointly understand audio, visual inputs, and language, but benchmark gains can be inflated when visual evidence alone is enough to answer a query. We study…

cover.title: LiSA: Lifelong Safety Adaptation via Conservative Policy Induction
cover.summary: As AI agents move from chat interfaces to systems that read private data, call tools, and execute multi-step workflows, guardrails become a last line of defense against concrete deployment harms. In…
cover.why_it_matters: LiSA 让 AI 从「回答问题」进化到「自动干活」，效率提升是量级的

cover.title: CurveBench: A Benchmark for Exact Topological Reasoning over Nested Jordan Curves
